post.description: Creates a new tenant (school) and an OrgAdmin user account. Returns JWT tokens for immediate use.

post.summary: Log in with email and password
post.description: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT access token and a refresh token.
Exchanges an expired access token and a valid refresh token for a new token pair.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

get.summary: Get the teacher record linked to the current user
get.description: Finds a Teacher in the current tenant whose email matches the authenticated user's email.
Redirects to the external OAuth provider for authentication. Currently a stub.
Handles the callback from an external OAuth provider. Currently a stub.
Returns all classes within the specified year, ordered by sort order.

post.description: Creates a new class within a year. Classes represent class divisions (e.g. 8A, 8B).

get.summary: List combined lesson configs for a year
get.description: Returns all combined lesson configurations for the specified year. Combined lessons allow multiple classes to share a time slot for the same subject.

post.description: Defines a combined lesson where specified classes share a time slot for a subject. Set isMandatory to true if classes must always be combined.

get.summary: Get a combined lesson config by ID

put.description: Updates the combined lesson settings and replaces the list of participating classes.

get.description: Returns all subject-period requirements for the specified year. Each defines how many periods per week a subject needs.

post.description: Defines how many periods per week a subject needs for this year, and whether double periods are preferred.

get.summary: Get a curriculum entry by ID

get.description: Returns all rooms for the current tenant, ordered by name.

post.description: Creates a new room. Rooms can be referenced by subjects that require a special room (e.g. science lab, gym).

get.description: Returns the current tenant's school details.

put.description: Updates the school name and default language. Requires OrgAdmin role.
Updates the school's setup completion status and per-step progress. Requires OrgAdmin role.

get.description: Returns counts of all major entities and the published timetable ID if available.
Returns all school days for the current tenant, ordered by sort order. School days represent the weekly schedule (e.g. Monday–Friday).

post.description: Creates a new school day. Each day has a day-of-week, active flag, and sort order.

get.summary: Get a school day by ID

put.description: Updates the active status and sort order of a school day.

delete.description: Permanently removes a school day and its associated time slots.

get.description: Returns all subjects for the current tenant, ordered by name.

post.description: Creates a new subject. Optionally link it to a special room. Scheduling constraints (max periods per day, double-period allowance) are configured per grade on the subject requirements.

get.summary: List blocked slots for a teacher
get.description: Returns all time slots that are blocked for the specified teacher. Blocked slots prevent the scheduler from assigning lessons during those times.

post.summary: Block a time slot for a teacher
post.description: Marks a specific time slot as unavailable for this teacher, with an optional reason.

get.summary: Get a blocked slot by ID

put.description: Updates the reason for a blocked time slot.

delete.description: Removes the block, making this time slot available again for the teacher.

get.summary: List day configs for a teacher
get.description: Returns all day-specific period limits for the specified teacher. Each config caps how many periods a teacher can teach on a given day.

post.description: Sets the maximum number of teaching periods a teacher can have on a specific teaching day.

get.summary: Get a teacher day config by ID

get.description: Returns all subject qualifications for the specified teacher. Each qualification defines which subject and grade range a teacher can teach.

post.description: Assigns a subject qualification to a teacher, with optional min/max grade range to restrict which grades they can teach.

get.description: Returns all teachers for the current tenant, ordered by name.

post.description: Creates a new teacher. Email is optional and can be used to link the teacher to a Viewer user account.

delete.description: Permanently removes a teacher and cascades to qualifications, day configs, and blocked slots.

get.summary: List time slots for a school day
get.description: Returns all time slots for the specified school day, ordered by slot number. Includes both lesson slots and breaks.

post.description: Creates a new time slot within a school day. Specify start/end times (HH:mm) and whether this slot is a break.

get.summary: Get a time slot by ID

post.description: Validates all configuration data before timetable generation.

get.description: Returns the most recently published timetable, if one exists.

post.description: Creates a timetable record in Generating status and enqueues async generation. Poll GET /{id} for status.

get.description: Returns timetable with current status. Use for polling generation progress.

delete.description: Permanently removes a timetable and all its entries and reports.

get.description: Returns entries, optionally filtered by classId, teacherId, or schoolDayId query parameters.

post.description: Changes status from Draft to Published.
Re-validates all entries against hard constraints and returns any violations.

get.summary: Get weekly view for a class
Get weekly view for a teacher
Get weekly view for a room

put.description: Updates a single entry in a Draft timetable. Validates against hard constraints; returns 409 if violations found.

get.description: Returns all users for the current tenant, ordered by display name.

post.description: Creates a new user within the current tenant. Requires OrgAdmin role. Valid roles: OrgAdmin, ScheduleManager, Viewer.

put.description: Updates the user's display name and role. Requires OrgAdmin role.

delete.description: Permanently removes a user from the tenant. Requires OrgAdmin role.

get.summary: List day configs for a year
get.description: Returns all day-specific period limits for the specified year. Each config caps how many periods a year can have on a given school day.

post.description: Sets the maximum number of teaching periods a year can have on a specific school day.

get.summary: Get a year day config by ID

get.description: Returns all year levels (e.g. Year 6, Year 7) for the current tenant, ordered by sort order.

post.description: Creates a new year level. Years represent year levels in the school (e.g. Year 8, Year 9).

delete.description: Permanently removes a year and cascades to associated classes and configurations.
